creator: matthias.andree@web.de
text:
Postfix-Snapshot is - as announced by Wietse Venema - vulnerable to the
same memory exhaustion attack that was reported and fixed for the stable
version in 20010228-pl08. An updated version, snapshot-20011116, is
available. 

However, the TLS stuff by Lutz Jänicke is for 20011115, so I'm
not adding a patch now because I'm unsure what's more important for the
maintainer: TLS ready or memory exhaustion attack bug fixed.

Fix: 

update to snapshot-20011116.
